== Notes for [[Item:Q53026|Q53026]] ==

{geni:about_me} Telipinu is known from a decree appointing him as a priest of Kizzuwadna.
<p>* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C5%A0uppiluliuma_I Šuppiluliuma I.]</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6708FF2551F511EFBBFD9A22EF79916BB1DC

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
